text.title: Positioning Diff Log Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Positioning Diff Log.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS, landing headline changed after 6 sales calls revealed mis-positioning.
example.trace: trigger = '6 sales calls' → old: 'Workflow automation for teams' → new: 'Notion automation for solo founders' → expected: trial CVR +25% in 30d → 30d check date set → 90d check date set
